title: Learning About History
text: History is {adjective} because we learn about {noun} and {noun} that happened long ago. I can't believe people used to dress in {adjective} clothing and kids played with {noun} and {noun} instead of video games. Also, before cars were invented, people actually rode {animal}! People read {noun} instead of computers and tablets, and sent messages via {noun} that took {number} days to arrive. I wonder how kids will view my life in {number} year(s); maybe they will ride flying cars to school and play with {noun} and {adjective} {noun}!
